13#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_INSTPRINTER_AMDGPUINSTPRINTER_H
14#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_INSTPRINTER_AMDGPUINSTPRINTER_H
15
16#include "llvm/ADT/StringRef.h"
17#include "llvm/MC/MCInstPrinter.h"
18#include "llvm/Support/raw_ostream.h"
19
20namespace llvm {
21
22class AMDGPUInstPrinter : public MCInstPrinter {
23public:
24 AMDGPUInstPrinter(const MCAsmInfo &MAI, const MCInstrInfo &MII,
25 const MCRegisterInfo &MRI)
26 : MCInstPrinter(MAI, MII, MRI) {}
27
28 //Autogenerated by tblgen
29 void printInstruction(const MCInst *MI, raw_ostream &O);
30 static const char *getRegisterName(unsigned RegNo);
31
32 void printInst(const MCInst *MI, raw_ostream &O, StringRef Annot) override;
33
34private:
35 void printU8ImmOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
36 void printU16ImmOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
37 void printU8ImmDecOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
38 void printU16ImmDecOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
39 void printU32ImmOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
40 void printOffen(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
41 void printIdxen(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
42 void printAddr64(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
43 void printMBUFOffset(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
44 void printDSOffset(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
45 void printDSOffset0(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
46 void printDSOffset1(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
47 void printGLC(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
48 void printSLC(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
49 void printTFE(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
50 void printRegOperand(unsigned RegNo, raw_ostream &O);
51 void printImmediate32(uint32_t I, raw_ostream &O);
52 void printImmediate64(uint64_t I, raw_ostream &O);
53 void printOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
54 void printOperandAndMods(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
55 static void printInterpSlot(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNum, raw_ostream &O);
56 void printMemOperand(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
57 static void printIfSet(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O,
58 StringRef Asm, StringRef Default = "");
59 static void printAbs(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
60 static void printClamp(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
61 static void printClampSI(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
62 static void printOModSI(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
63 static void printLiteral(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
64 static void printLast(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
65 static void printNeg(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
66 static void printOMOD(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
67 static void printRel(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
68 static void printUpdateExecMask(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo,
69 raw_ostream &O);
70 static void printUpdatePred(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
71 static void printWrite(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
72 static void printSel(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
73 static void printBankSwizzle(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
74 static void printRSel(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
75 static void printCT(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
76 static void printKCache(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
77 static void printSendMsg(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
78 static void printWaitFlag(const MCInst *MI, unsigned OpNo, raw_ostream &O);
79};
80
81} // End namespace llvm
